boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Monitor-only no-block disposition permits release only when the exact counterparty and account match. The account mismatch (7205 vs 7025) and the visible FLAG-TES-074 prevent this.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: PAY-TES-074 targets account 7205, CLR-TES-074 covers account 7025, and FLAG-TES-074 is unresolved.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The account mismatch and the unresolved FLAG-TES-074 leave the source boundary open, preventing release.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CLR-TES-074 does not cover the payment target account (7205). FLAG-TES-074 remains visible and unresolved, blocking release.

critical_features_preserved: Exact source match rule for name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition.
Account field specificity as a critical matching criterion.
final_answer: ESCALATE. The source boundary remains open due to a critical account mismatch between the payment (7205) and the clearance scope (7025), as well as an unresolved sanctions flag (FLAG-TES-074). The policy STD-TES-074-P requires exact matches, which are not present. Release is not permitted.
open_blockers: Account mismatch: PAY-TES-074 targets account 7205, while CLR-TES-074 covers account 7025.
Unresolved sanctions flag: FLAG-TES-074 remains visible with no disposition confirmed.
Dependency: CLR-TES-074 scope does not align with the payment target account.
